error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found 404
title: 404 Not Found Error on GET Request
symptom: When using the HTTP Request node to perform a GET request, n8n returns a 404 error indicating that the resource could not be found.
applies_when: Attempting to perform a GET request
root_cause: The API being called only supports POST requests for the specific operation being attempted. Attempting to use GET results in a 404 error because the resource is not available via that method.
fix_steps: Change the HTTP Request node method from GET to POST
Ensure the correct URL and parameters are set for the POST request
agent_instruction: Switch the HTTP Request node to use the POST method instead of GET.
